hero.desc: I design intuitive digital products with a focus on user needs, visual craft, and systems thinking — from first sketch to shipped.

items.title: UI/UX Design
items.desc: From early wireframes to pixel-perfect interfaces — with a focus on usability, visual hierarchy, and interaction craft.

items.title: Design Systems
items.desc: Scalable token architectures, component libraries, and design-to-code documentation that keep teams aligned at speed.

items.title: User Research
items.desc: Interviews, usability tests, card sorts, and synthesis frameworks that ground design decisions in real user behaviour.
